listitem.para: For Koreans, a response of “yes” may not have the same connotation as it does in the European American culture. What does it mean in the Korean culture?
Explain the name format for Koreans and how you would address them.
When family violence is suspected, how might you approach the topic?
What is hyo and how is it displayed?
What needs to be included in an orientation program for Koreans to be successful in the workforce?
Name at least three common health conditions among Koreans.
What is Tae-Kyo and what is its purpose?
What is the term for traditional Korean medicine and what are its principles?
What is Hwa-Byung and what are its causes and symptoms?
How do more traditional Koreans see disability?
